mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no AS orderNo, total_amount AS totalAmount, discount_amount AS discountAmount, final_amount AS finalAmount, payment_type AS paymentType, status, note, ordered_at AS orderedAt FROM orders ORDER BY ordered_at DESC
SELECT id, category_id AS categoryId, name, description, price, cost, is_available AS isAvailable FROM menus WHERE is_available = 1 ORDER BY category_id, name
